sections_cited: Section 25 of the Sindh Arms Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2050 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of case. 01.01.2026 Mr. M.J @ Raees Amir Lutuf Ali Khan advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Sindh along with SIP Faheem Hussain DIGP Office Hyderabad and SIP Allahyar Balal PS Khybrani District Matiari. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani A.P.G. Sindh. SIP Allahyar Balal of Police Station Khebrani files his report, which is taken on record. He submits that the alleged detainee, namely Aijaz, has been arrested in FIR No.45/2025 under Sections 397 and 341 PPC and FIR No.70/2025 under Section 25 of the Sindh Arms Act, 2013, registered at Police Station Khebrani. He further submits that challans in both cases have been submitted before the trial Court and the said Aijaz is presently confined in Central Prison, Hyderabad. When this position was confronted to learned counsel for the petitioner, he stated that he does not press the instant petition and submits that the petitioner intends to approach the competent forum for redressal of his grievance. In view of the above, the instant petition is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
